About Me

Who I Am

🎓 Engineering Student

I'm a passionate B.Tech Computer Science (AI & Data Science) student at JSPM University, Pune, with a strong foundation in machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI. I love turning raw data into meaningful business insights.

With hands-on experience in RAG pipelines, LangChain, LangGraph, and Agentic AI systems, I approach every problem with a business-first mindset — asking what real problem does this solve? before choosing a technical approach.

Beyond tech, I'm an avid reader (5+ years) across business, finance, and self-improvement — and I genuinely believe that business acumen combined with analytical thinking is what makes a great data scientist.

My Work

Featured Projects

Real-world projects built with production-grade code — from RAG pipelines to ML models and responsive web apps.

RAG-Based AI Teaching Assistant

An intelligent teaching assistant that answers questions strictly from uploaded book summary videos. Converts video into a searchable knowledge base via speech-to-text, then retrieves the most relevant context using semantic search to generate accurate, grounded responses.

Technologies Used
Python RAG LangChain Ollama Semantic Search Speech-to-Text
View Project

House Price Prediction ML Pipeline

An end-to-end machine learning pipeline that predicts residential property prices from features like location, size, and bedrooms. Built with modular, production-grade code structure with full logging, data preprocessing, and feature engineering.

Technologies Used
Python Scikit-Learn Pandas NumPy Matplotlib Logging
View Project

Saikrupa Auto Suzuki — Dealership Website

A fully responsive single-page dealership website for an authorized Suzuki Access 125 dealer. Features animated hero slider with all 7 colour variants, interactive EMI calculator, bike comparison lightbox, and WhatsApp enquiry integration. Deployed live on Netlify.

Technologies Used
HTML5 CSS3 JavaScript Netlify
View Live Site
